queries.question: List all international baccalaureate programs and advanced placement programs with 30 credits.
queries.sql:
SELECT Education_Programs.name 
FROM Education_Programs
WHERE (Education_Programs.Type = "International Baccalaureate Program" OR Education_Programs.Type = "Advanced Placement Program") AND Education_Programs.Credits = 30
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?education_programs a :Education_Programs .
  ?education_programs p:name ?name .
  ?education_programs p:Type ?type_w .
  ?education_programs p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?education_programs p:Credits ?credits_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "International Baccalaureate Program" || STR(?type_w2) = "Advanced Placement Program")) && (STR(?credits_w) = "30" || STR(?credits_w) = "30.0")))
}
